name: Find my device
description: Find-my-device tracker. Shows where your trackers are via Home Assistant device_tracker entities — Apple AirTags (FindMy/iCloud HA integration), Tile/iTag/SmartTag, phones, anything HA tracks. The tile shows the primary tracker's current place (Thuis / a zone / Onderweg); each tracker can raise an Inbox alert when it leaves home. Needs HA URL + a long-lived token in findmy.conf.
